mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comp_leave_grant ( employee_id, overtime_month, days, used_days, expire_date, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{overtimeMonth}, #{days}, #{usedDays}, #{expireDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comp_leave_grant WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY expire_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comp_leave_grant SET used_days = #{usedDays}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comp_leave_grant WHERE status = 1 AND expire_date < #{today}
mapper.update: UPDATE comp_leave_grant SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
